decomposition_interpretation_corrections.delta_protocol: PD exactly 0 (EQUIVALENT). SCZ -0.17pp: judge equivalence ONLY by the un-rounded cohort CI vs the pre-registered EPS_EQ_PP band, NOT the displayed -0.50. Ruled OUT: encoder-vs-full selection is NOT the cause of the historical magnitude drop.
decomposition_interpretation_corrections.delta_implementation: MUST NOT be causally split into P2.2/drop_last/determinism contributions: the historical pipeline had CUDA nondeterminism AND bundled multiple implementation differences. decomposition_interpretation_corrections.current_estimates: SCZ +1.8, PD +2.3 are 2-SEED point estimates of the current frozen pipeline = the current Freeze A1 estimates, NOT final cohort-level confirmatory inference. Precision is added ONLY per the already-frozen seed/confirmatory plan, never result-driven.
